title: System C CareFlow PAS ledger integration
content:
## PAS ledger role

IAR complements the PAS/EPR record system — it does not replace it. The front desk agent reads and writes:
- Slot availability search
- Booking confirmation with reference
- Cancellation and rebooking
- Waitlist positions

## Demo mode
When DEMO_MODE=true, all ledger operations use local mock data. No live NHS systems are called.

## Booking confirmation fields
booking_ref, slot_ref, patient_ref, status (confirmed/cancelled/rebooked), start/end ISO 8601 Europe/London, clinician, location, calendar_hint for patient calendar write.
